name: Contoso Environment Variables
description: Variables that change between dev and prod environments. Used by notebooks, pipelines, and Spark jobs to configure behavior per environment.

variables.name: LAKEHOUSE_NAME
variables.description: Display name of the primary gold lakehouse for analytics workloads
variables.notes: Lakehouse names are consistent across environments; workspace context provides isolation.

variables.name: WAREHOUSE_NAME
variables.description: Display name of the central data warehouse
variables.notes: Used in pipeline SQL steps and notebook warehouse connections.

variables.name: SQL_DATABASE_NAME
variables.description: Display name of the OLTP operational SQL database
variables.notes: Powers POS, inventory, and CRM transactional workloads.

variables.name: DATA_RETENTION_DAYS
variables.description: Number of days to retain raw/bronze data before archival or deletion
variables.notes: Dev uses shorter retention to minimize storage costs. Prod retains 1 year for compliance.

variables.name: BATCH_SIZE
variables.description: Number of records per batch in pipeline copy activities and Spark write operations
variables.notes: Smaller batches in dev for faster iteration and lower capacity consumption.

variables.name: LOG_LEVEL
variables.description: Logging verbosity for notebooks, Spark jobs, and pipeline activities
variables.notes: DEBUG in dev captures full trace for troubleshooting. WARNING in prod reduces log volume and cost.

variables.name: REFRESH_SCHEDULE_CRON
variables.description: Cron expression for scheduled data refresh (semantic models, pipelines)
variables.notes: Dev is manual-trigger only. Prod refreshes every 4 hours (6x/day).
